audit_items.proof_trace: The balance check at L437-440 reads `IERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this))` and reverts with `BidAmountTooHigh` if `amount > availableBalance`. Between this check and the subsequent `safeTransfer` at L444, only `_getAssetOutAmount` (declared `internal view`) executes — it cannot mutate the asset balance. The reentrancy guard (`s_entered = true` set at L418 before any external calls) prevents any callback during the transfer from re-entering `bid` and bypassing the check.
